steps.title: Use the dot plot statistics
steps.content: From the dot plot for set A, the mean capacity is $8$ microfarads and the range is $12$ microfarads.

steps.title: Shift every value upward
steps.content:
Adding $13$ microfarads to every value in set B increases the mean by $13$ but does not change the range.
$$8+13=21$$
So set B has mean $21$ microfarads and range $12$ microfarads. The answer is C.
